    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

    B

    BACKGROUND_COLOR - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUI
     
    BEIGE - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUIBoard
     
    BLACK_LOG - Statische Variable in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
     
    BLACK_NAME - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUIBoard
     
    blackData - Variable in Klasse persistance.GameStateData
     
    blackStoneSlots - Variable in Klasse view.GUIBoard
     
    blockBeginnerTrap(List<Node[]>, ImaginativePlayer) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
    Identifies and executes a move to block an opponent's potential trap during the setting phase of the game.
    BLOCKED - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse boardLogic.GameManager.LossCause
     
    blockMill(List<Node[]>, List<Node[]>, ImaginativePlayer) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
    Identifies a potential move to block the opponent from forming a mill.
    blockZwickmill(List<Node[]>, List<Node[]>, ImaginativePlayer) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
    Identifies a potential move to block an opponent's "Zwick Mill" formation.
    BOARD_IMAGE_PATH - Statische Variable in Klasse view.HomeScreenPanel
     
    BOARD_NAME - Statische Variable in Klasse view.DifficultyScreenPanel
     
    BOARD_NAME - Statische Variable in Klasse view.MenuScreenPanel
     
    BOARD_SCREEN_NAME - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUI
     
    BOARD_SIZE - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUIBoard
     
    boardCopy - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
     
    boardLogic - Package boardLogic
     
    boardManager - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
     
    BoardManager - Klasse in boardLogic
    Manages the state of the game board and interactions with it in the game.
    BoardManager() - Konstruktor für Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
    Initializes the board
    BoardScreenPanel - Klasse in view
    This class creates the board screen panel for the game, which includes the game board, timer settings, and control buttons.
    BoardScreenPanel() - Konstruktor für Klasse view.BoardScreenPanel
     
    boardSnapshot - Variable in Klasse persistance.Move
     
    boardSnapshot - Variable in Klasse persistance.MoveData
     
    BUTTON_COLOR - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUI
     
    BUTTON_FONT - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GUI
